payload.description: 50th station enhanced in this initiative was unveiled at Junction Blvd in Queens
New York City Transit's efforts as part of the Faster, Cleaner, Safer initiative
New York City Transit's Zero-Emission commitment including first partnership with New York Power Authority for charging infrastructure installation
New paid internship program matching young people with disabilities with paid work opportunities; first group of six summer interns hosted
partners: New York State Office of Adult Career and Continuing Education Service-Vocational Rehabilitation (ACCES-VR)
New York State Commission for the Blind (NYSCB)

payload.description: Regular Meeting of Committee on Operations of the MTA New York City Transit Authority, Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority, Staten Island Rapid Transit Operating Authority, and MTA Bus Company

tool_args.label: Committee Approval of Prevost Bus Procurement

payload.description: Committee voted to approve purchase contract to Prevost Car (US) Inc. for 250 over-the-road diesel express buses with option for up to 131 additional buses
Return of the Bus Rodeo, an occasion to celebrate the workforce

tool_args.label: Family Day at Coney Island Yard

payload.description: First-ever Family Day at Coney Island Yard for the Department of Subways

tool_args.label: Crime reduction in subways - September 2023 vs September 2022

payload.raw_value_text: 12.5% reduction in crime in the subways when compared to September 2022

tool_args.label: Overall crime index decrease Jan-Sept 2023 vs 2022

payload.raw_value_text: from January through September the overall crime index has decreased 5% from 2022
shooting incidents in the subways are down 62.5%

tool_args.label: Customer satisfaction jump at Penn Station

payload.raw_value_text: 15% jump at Penn Station on the 1, 2, 3
increase of 8% in overall cleanliness satisfaction

tool_args.label: 250 over-the-road diesel express buses base quantity

payload.raw_value_text: option for up to 131 additional buses for a total of 381 buses
an additional $111.7 million for the options

tool_args.label: NYCT response to September 29th historic rainfall

payload.claim_text: President Davey commended the resilience of the entire Transit team for its response to the September 29th historic rainfall from Tropical Storm Ophelia. He discussed the challenges New York City Transit faced from the storm and applauded the hard work of all employees involved, including customer service agents and the Department of Buses and Subways.

tool_args.label: New E-350 vehicles for Access-A-Ride and R211S train

payload.claim_text: Two new vehicles debuted last month: first of 15 new E-350 vehicles for the Access-A-Ride fleet, and the first 5-car R211S train in Staten Island, which made the trip across the Narrows to the newly rebuilt Clifton Yard.

tool_args.label: National Bus Task Force addressing bus manufacturing

payload.claim_text: President Davey will be representing MTA on a National Bus Task Force working with Chicago Transit President Dorval Carter to address the need for more bus manufacturers in the US.
Celebration of a major milestone of New York City Transit's Re-NEW-Vation program at Junction Blvd in Queens, as the 50th station enhanced in this initiative was unveiled.

tool_args.label: Station accessibility improvements at Hoyt St, E 146th, New Dorp

payload.claim_text: Improvements made at Hoyt St. (2,3) in downtown Brooklyn, E 146th (6) in the South Bronx, and the New Dorp station on the Staten Island Railway. Improvements at the Hoyt station were fully funded and will be maintained by Macy's.

tool_args.label: ACTA open positions accepting applications until November 20, 2023

payload.claim_text: MTA's Advisory Committee for Transit Accessibility (ACTA) has open positions and is accepting applications until November 20, 2023.
Chief Kemper reported that arrests and issuance of summonses have also increased.

President Davey discussed the difficulties in the bus manufacturing industry and steps the MTA is considering taking to ensure the bus industry remains healthy and competitive. They are looking at pre-qualifying new, experienced companies and that Subways and procurement are part of a national working group to streamline bus procurements.

tool_args.label: NYPA charging infrastructure partnership for Zero-Emission

payload.description: first partnership with New York Power Authority for charging infrastructure installation
Purchase contract to Prevost Car (US) Inc. for 250 over-the-road diesel express buses with options
Safety and security report delivered by Chief Michael Kemper
Paid internship program through the Partnership for Inclusive Internships (PII) program, developed by AHRC

tool_args.label: GSM Wiltshire example in Faster Cleaner Safer initiative

payload.description: GSM Charry Wiltshire's customer satisfaction up at 13 of 16 stations, including 15% jump at Penn Station
